title: sideritis candicans var. angae
intro: Sideritis candicans var. angae, also known as Angae Sideritis, is a perennial plant species belonging to the genus Sideritis, native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Angae Sideritis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable component in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Angae Sideritis, such as teas and infusions, are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties, and the plant is also used in the production of herbal supplements and essential oils.
